title: De Binksma - Modded Editie
description: A mainly tech based modpack with elements of exploration and magic. Mainly inteded for a private modded server we run, but feel free to use it!
body:
## Who is this for?:
This modpack is tailored to offer a fun experience for an SMP server. It features a medium level of complexity, making it suitable for a community with varying levels of modded minecraft experience.
## Technical information:
* This modpack runs in 1.19.2 and uses the forge modloader

* The mod list is visible on [the version page](https://modrinth.com/modpack/debinksmod/version/0.1.3).
## Further credits for non modrinth mods:
* [Citadel by sbom_xela (curseforge because 1.19.2 isn't available on modrinth)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/citadel) - [Modrinth link](https://modrinth.com/mod/citadel)
* [Configured by MrCrayFish (curseforge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/configured)
* [Flux Networks By SonarSonic](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/flux-networks)
